items.title: Suvendu Adhikari Cabinet approves BSF land transfer for border fencing, initiates Census exercise in Bengal
items.summary: Alleging that the previous government did not implement the BNS in violation of the Constitution, Mr. Adhikari said the Cabinet has decided to implement the criminal law in the State

items.title: ‘Gracias El Clasico’: Title look of Tovino Thomas-Nazriya Nazim starrer unveiled
items.summary: The leading duo unveiled the title look of the film during the kickoff of the El Clasico match-up between Barcelona FC and Real Madrid, streaming it live through their social media handles at 12.30 am.

items.title: Team SERSA wins 2026 DRM Cup Table Tennis title at Railway Indoor Stadium in Visakhapatnam
items.summary: Team SPINX finished as runners-up and Pimples Panters third in the two-day tournament that drew 51 players from 17 teams

items.title: Vinesh reaches Gonda, insists she is eligible to compete; WFI says her reply incomplete
items.summary: In her response, Vinesh argued that she had formally intimated UWW about her comeback well in advance and, therefore, fulfilled the procedural requirements needed to return to competition.

items.title: Mother's Day Gift Ideas: Five Financial Plans To Give Her Lifelong Security

items.title: PM Modi Paves Way To Keep Power Well Beyond 2030: Bloomberg Analysis
items.summary: PM Modi has successfully reframed the BJP's campaign around religious identity

items.title: Tamil Nadu government formation updates: AMMK chief Dhinakaran refutes party's support to TVK
items.summary: Dhinakaran accused the TVK of submitting a "forged" letter to the Governor and slammed them for horse trading; TVK has reportedly denied these charges and accused Mr. Dhinakaran of spreading "false news"

items.title: Government to decide whether schools teaching religion are charitable or religious bodies: Supreme Court
items.summary: A Bench headed by Justice Dipankar Datta said the issue is within the domain of the Ministry of Education, and the court need not intervene for now

items.summary: An APK file is used by Android operating system for the distribution and installation of apps.

items.summary: The road will first be expanded to six lanes and later to 10 lanes to meet future traffic needs.

items.title: Husband held for alleged dowry harassment in Visakhapatnam; wife dies 45 days after marriage

items.title: Impact Of PM Modi's Speech Out: Jewellery Stocks Take The First Hit
items.summary: According to experts, gold as an asset is stable, but jewellery stocks are not.

items.title: Rahul Gandhi slams Modi's WFH, 'don't buy gold for a year' appeal amid Iran war – ‘compromised PM’
items.summary: Addressing a rally in in Hyderabad on Sunday, PM Modi suggested reducing petrol and diesel consumption, using metro rail services in cities, carpooling and working from home to conserve foreign exchange amid the crisis in West Asia.

items.title: 2 Suspected Bangladeshi Smugglers Killed In Border Firing By BSF In Tripura
items.summary: Bodies of two suspected smugglers handed to Bangladesh after BSF firing in Tripura.

items.title: "Large Pendency": Top Court Orders High Courts To Hear Bail Pleas On Priority
items.summary: The Supreme Court flagged the alarming pendency of cases in some jurisdictions.

items.title: 'Your utility is done': Oppn warns of petrol, diesel price hike after PM Modi's appeal to cut fuel use amid West Asia crisis
items.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi urged citizens to reduce fuel and edible oil consumption, citing the West Asia crisis and global supply chain disruptions. Opposition parties criticized the appeal, calling it an admission of failure and a shift of responsibility onto the public after elections. The BJP defended the PM's call as responsible leadership and national interest.
